box_office_hours: Thursday and Friday from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM
parking_info: Free street parking is available along Beale St, and there is an on-site parking lot.
accessibility_info: The building, including entrances, restrooms, lounge, and backstage areas are all accessible with ramps or flat surfaces. Seating marked with a wheelchair icon is reserved for patrons in wheelchairs or walkers with seats.
historic_note: Originally built as the State Theater in 1948. Purchased by Kingman Center for the Arts in 2018 and renovated as a world-class performing arts venue.
awards: 2025 Project of the Year Award - Small Cities and Rural Communities (APWA, Arizona Chapter)
renovation_partners: T.R. Orr Inc. and Angle Homes (general contractors)
